# backend/agentic_adapter/discovery.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-11T10:01:42Z

## Purpose
Discover every backend router · enumerate endpoints · classify capability.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import importlib
- from `_` import inspect
- from `pathlib` import Path
- from `typing` import Any

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `_category(module_name)`: (no docstring)
- `discover_router_modules()`: Find every backend/<X>/router.py · skip agentic namespaces + sub-folders.
- `introspect_router(module_name)`: Load a router module · return endpoint inventory + classification.
- `discover_all()`: Run discovery + introspection over all non-agentic routers.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- Routers already covered by the 4 agentic namespaces · skip those
- Heuristic category mapping based on router module name
- Endpoint becomes a skill candidate
